Package net.sf.saxon.tree

This package contains subpackages containing the code for different tree models.

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    NamespaceNode
    This class represents a namespace node; it is used in several tree models.

Package net.sf.saxon.tree Description

This package contains subpackages containing the code for different tree models. It also contains the class NamespaceNode which is used by several tree models.

Michael H. Kay
Saxonica Limited
28 November 2011
